rationale: Both correctly diagnose the base-tokenizer/config mismatch and recommend the same dit.yaml workaround the thread confirmed (FayeSpica), and both propose the same guard+docs follow-up matching Gaohan123's close-and-track request. X is better grounded: it cites specific yaml header lines for both configs, explicitly credits @akshatvishu and @FayeSpica by name (mirroring the thread's actual flow), and gives a concrete patch snippet for the fail-fast fix. Y is slightly weaker on grounding since it introduces an unverified third config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not present anywhere in the issue thread, and its 'Run report' template format reads as less integrated with the reporter's specific ask than X's direct reply structure.
